ground_truth.findings: Stable mild thoracic levoscoliosis. Stable cardiomegaly. Multiple scattered round calcific densities [REDACTED] represent old granulomatous disease. No pneumothorax or pleural effusion. No focal consolidation. Moderate degenerative changes of the thoracic spine.
ground_truth.impression: Stable cardiomegaly with no focal airspace disease.
